Bash(DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=3310 DB_USER=user DB_PASSWORD="Riyanitaccess@26+" DB_NAME=riyan_nextjs node -e "const mysql = require\(''mysql2/promise''\); const csv = require\(''csv-parser''\); const fs = require\(''fs''\); \(async \(\) => { const rows = []; fs.createReadStream\(''exports/projects-export-2026-01-07-15-31-08.csv''\).pipe\(csv\(\)\).on\(''data'', \(row\) => { if \(rows.length < 1 && row.content_editable && row.content_editable.length > 100\) rows.push\(row\); }\).on\(''end'', \(\) => { if \(rows.length > 0\) { console.log\(''=== Sample Project ===''\); console.log\(''Title:'', rows[0].title\); console.log\(''\\n=== Content \(HTML\) ===''\); console.log\(rows[0].content.substring\(0, 300\)\); console.log\(''\\n=== Content Editable \(Markdown\) ===''\); console.log\(rows[0].content_editable.substring\(0, 500\)\); } }\); }\)\(\)")
